name: flow-06-validation-tier-assignment
description: T99 JoinRequestValidator (3 reads + distinct error codes) → T100 MembershipTierAssigner (server-side tier from xiigen-subscriptions).

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: T99 distinct error codes (not VALIDATION_FAILURE), T100 requestedTier absent from input
Retrieve server-side-tier-assignment and distinct-error-codes patterns for FLOW-06
Break into: T99 (3 reads + distinct codes) + T100 (subscription lookup → assignedTier + accessLevels[])

Generate join-request-validator.service.ts (T99) and membership-tier-assigner.service.ts (T100). T99 returns GROUP_NOT_FOUND/USER_BANNED/ALREADY_MEMBER/INVALID_INVITE_TOKEN. T100 reads xiigen-subscriptions.
Score against iron rules: distinct error codes, server-side tier
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
